preownedConditionHighlights.highlightContent: Each Pre-Owned item listed comes from Walmart’s trusted performance-managed sellers, to ensure you get quality items.
Save even more on top brands & your most-loved items.
Don’t love it? Most items offer a 30-day* free return policy, for added peace of mind.
Shopping Pre-Owned helps in extending the life of an item & reducing waste.

preownedConditionNotes.conditionNoteDetails: Product image for illustration purposes only. The item you receive may vary from the image in minor ways, such as slight differences in appearance, color, and/or design. *Exceptions apply during holiday season, and on certain electronics, collectibles, and jewelry.

_rawConfigs.preownedConditionSubHeadingContent: Walmart Pre-Owned allows you to find previously owned, well-cared-for items from Walmart’s trusted & performance-managed sellers. Shopping Pre-Owned allows you to bring home the best-quality picks at even lower prices, in addition to extending the life of an item & reducing waste. Find your favorites & shop a range of conditions in every category.
_rawConfigs.preownedConditionSubHeadingName: What is the Walmart Pre-Owned Program?

preownedConditionTypes.conditionTypeDefinition: Excellent condition but has been gently used or worn previously. Tags and labels are still attached.
Fair condition with visible signs of wear or usage (which can include scratches, fading, missing parts and accessories). Tags or labels may not be attached.
Good condition with minimal signs of wear or usage (may have scuffs, marks, stains or scratches). Tags and labels are still attached.
Brand-new and unused but without original packaging or tags and labels.
Brand-new and unused but without original packaging or tags and labels.
Brand-new, unused, and functional but with cosmetic imperfections caused during production or delivery. This could include missing threads, discoloration, label malfunction, etc.

_rawConfigs.promotionTitle: Save up to 35% on additional pairs
_rawConfigs.termsText:
Purchase multiple pairs of eyeglasses (frame & prescription lenses) to get 20% off each additional pair of glasses after your first order. Multiple qualifying glasses must be purchased during a single online transaction. Qualifying purchases include: a complete pair of prescription eyeglasses (frame & prescription lenses) or an insurance order for a complete pair of glasses. Insurance benefits should be maximized on the first order (if applicable).

Discounts must be applied to qualifying orders that are of equal or lesser value. For 35% off, purchase a complete pair of sunglasses in addition to a second complete pair. Qualifying purchases include any prescription polarized or non-polarized sun lens & frame purchase. The least expensive pair(s) will receive the 35% discount.

seoItemMetaData.metaTitle: No Boundaries High Rise Skinny Jeans for Juniors Sizes 00-20 with Stretch
seoItemMetaData.metaDescription: No Boundaries Juniors High Rise Skinny Jeans in sizes 00-20 feature stretch fabric, 5 pockets, and a high waist. Machine washable and versatile for day or night wear

product.shortDescription: Here's the tea...high-rise jeans are always in! Scoop up a pair of No Boundaries High Rise Skinny Jeans for cool, on-trend looks with all your favorite tops and sweaters. This essential denim silhouette is crafted with a touch of stretch for a curve-skimming fit—a must for all-day comfort. These skinny jeans are a beyond-versatile pair that take you from day to night (just swap out your flats for heels!). Stock up today with our money-saving one or two-pack. Only at Walmart.

Scoop up a pair of No Boundaries High Rise Skinny Jeans for cool, on-trend looks with all your favorite tops and sweaters. This essential denim silhouette is crafted with a touch of stretch for a curve-skimming fit—a must for all-day comfort. genAiDetails.genAiDescriptionBullet:
• Material Blend: Composed of 54% Cotton, 26% Polyester, 19% Rayon, and 1% Spandex for a comfortable stretch denim.
  • Care Instructions: Designed for easy maintenance, these jeans are machine washable.
  • Fit Profile: Features a skinny fit with a high-rise waist and an approximate 29-inch inseam.
  • Closure Style: Secured with a classic button closure and a convenient zip fly.
  • Pocket Configuration: Includes traditional five-pocket styling for practical storage.
  • Design Elements: Equipped with belt loops and crafted from stretch denim for enhanced comfort.
  • Packaging Option: Available for purchase as a single pair or a money-saving two-pack.

directions.name: Fabric Care Instructions
directions.value: Machine wash cold with like colors. Only non-chlorine bleach when needed. Tumble dry low. Cool iron if needed.

idml.longDescription:
• Material: 54% Cotton/26% Polyester/19% Rayon/1% Spandex
  • Care: Machine washable
  • Country of Origin: Imported
  • Size: Model is approx. 5'10'' and is wearing a size 4
  • Fit: Skinny
  • Rise and Inseam: High-rise; approx. 29'' inseam
  • Closure: Button closure with zip fly
  • Pockets: Five-pocket styling
  • Features: Belt loops; stretch denim
  • High Rise Skinny Jeans 1 or 2-Pack for Women from No Boundaries

These skinny jeans are a beyond-versatile pair that take you from day to night (just swap out your flats for heels!). Stock up today with our money-saving one or two-pack. Only at Walmart.

specifications.name: Fabric content
specifications.value: 69% BCI Cotton, 26% Recycled Polyester, 3% Other, 2% Spandex

specifications.name: Fabric care instructions
specifications.value: Machine wash cold with like colors. Only non-chlorine bleach when needed. Tumble dry low. Cool iron if needed.

customerReviews.reviewText: The jeans are okay! I usually wear size 6–8 and got these in size 8 — they button up easily and feel comfortable at the waist. I'm 5'4'', and the 29'' length is perfect for me. The only thing I don't really like is that they don't fit super tight on the legs — they stick out a bit in some spots. But you can see that on the model too, so I guess that's just the style — a slightly looser skinny fit. Overall, a good option for the price.

Size 14 I am a 6' Female and the jeans length standing, hides my ankles. Thank goodness I'm not fond of wearing or buying high water jeans , that weren't intended to be that style like capris.

No elastic back, would not consider the jeans a light wash. The jeans fit great for my butt but I do not have a big butt. Silver rivets ...where are those located on these jeans?

High waisted and they are true to size I am 140lbs and got a size 6, they fit great on my waist and thighs but they are a little big and baggy on my calf's and ankle. I don't care for the length (I am 5'1) as they are a tad bit long for my liking. Will be returning

These jeans are perfect if you have a thicker waist which I do. I have a lot of trouble finding jeans that fit perfectly on the hip but my waist won't allow me to do the button up. So these are just right due to the fact that they super stretch. Love them.

I do not have a buttocks or hips to keep pants from falling down especially when bending over. I am 5 " 124 lbs and just love these slightly stretchy jeans. I sure hope they continue carrying this type of material so I can buy a whole line of colors and styles in jeans, slacks and shorts. I'm not a fan of shopping on lne and less of a fan of shopping for clothes I can't try on. thanks walmart fashion dept. for helping me to find a pair of jeans I don't have to apologize for then falling off my buttocks. sincerely, a very happy 72 yrs old class of 71 central High School Go Cobblers

Recently I needed to update my wardrobe. So went on line searching for new jeans. The brand No Boundaries was recommended by a family member. I have had No Boundaries before so went on line and found and ordered a pair. Very pleased with the fit and price. They fit nicely. Will order a couple more pair in near future.

I am 5'1 and 140lbs I got my true size which is a 6. They fit good around my waist and thighs but they aren't “skinny” like how I like them. I little more on the baggy side on my calf's and near my ankles which looks a little funny. Will be returning because they don't look very good on me.

This is only 1/2 my order, delivered by two locations on the same night. First delivery person no problem getting in the security gate and delivering my package; the SECOND DELIVERY PERSON decided that since I wouldn't actually give her my security code that she wasn't going to deliver so she cancelled my order. And this is my reminder why I don't order from Walmart delivery!!

The shape of these are not at all like the black pair, the black pair is softer and stretches better.  These are very, very small in the waist and the length is good. They run small go up a size, especially if you dry them in a dryer. I don't have a washer or dryer so I hand wash and hang dry and these still seemed to have shrunk.
Overall, they are good quality and I recommend them, but the waist is too short and they cut into your ribs and squeeze your belly. I recommend making the waist longer/higher! These are so not high waisted.

I ordered 2 different colors in the same size.  The black fit perfectly, nice stretch and soft comfortable fabric.  The grey was stiff, scratchy,  and so small I couldn't pull them all the way up.  So disappointed a product would have such disparity in sizes.

topNegativeReview.reviewText: This runs very small, I'm a size 10 with loft jeans %26 H%26M jeans but I got the 12 in this because I read the reviews said it ran small but even the 12 is too tight in the waist, a 14 would probably fit better in the waist but then the legs would be too baggy, this is not a skinny jeans. Th description says it's a 20” inseam but it is definitely not 29” but 27.5” so it's way too short for me as well. I do not recommend buying it if you have long legs.

topPositiveReview.reviewText: The jeans are okay! I usually wear size 6–8 and got these in size 8 — they button up easily and feel comfortable at the waist. I'm 5'4'', and the 29'' length is perfect for me. The only thing I don't really like is that they don't fit super tight on the legs — they stick out a bit in some spots. But you can see that on the model too, so I guess that's just the style — a slightly looser skinny fit. Overall, a good option for the price.
